note: Pricing data is from vendor docs only. G2 pricing field not accessible (JS-gated). No Vendr/Tropic data accessible. All pricing tagged as 'official' from vendor docs.

pricing.details: PR summarization only (no code reviews in PR). Code reviews available via VS Code extension and CLI. 14-day Pro+ trial included. Rate limits: 3 PR reviews/hr, 1 file/review, 3 chat/hr, 150 IDE/hr.
PR reviews, higher rate limits, Knowledge base (learnings, code guidelines, multi-repo), linter/SAST tools, analytics, docstrings, autofix. 5 reviews/hr, 5 files/review.
Everything in Pro + CodeRabbit Plan (issue-to-coding-plan), unit test generation, merge conflict resolution, Change Stack, pre/post-merge actions. 10 reviews/hr.
Self-hosting, multi-org, SLA + dedicated CSM, AWS/GCP Marketplace, API access, custom RBAC, audit logging. 12 reviews/hr.
Community-maintained, donated to open-source foundation. Requires own API key. Full feature set available. No rate limits on self-hosted.
Qodo 2.0 is a full AI code review platform, distinct from open-source PR-Agent. Free tier available.

market_positioning.coderabbit: Platform play: $24-48/dev/month. Competing with GitHub Copilot (included in some plans) on depth and codebase-awareness rather than price. Usage-based add-on for overflow. Enterprise self-hosting available.
market_positioning.pr_agent: Free/open-source with BYOK model. Donated to community by Qodo. Qodo captures enterprise users with Qodo 2.0 platform that has more features than OSS PR-Agent.
market_positioning.greptile: Pricing unknown - no accessible pricing page found. [unverified]

rate_limits_signal: CodeRabbit's rate limits (3-12 reviews/hr depending on plan) reveal per-developer pricing model and that reviews are computationally expensive (full repo clone + multiple parallel agents). PR-Agent's '~30 seconds, low cost' design is explicitly positioned as the cost-conscious alternative.

commercial_strategy_signals.signal: CodeRabbit careers page active, multiple open roles, unlimited PTO, equity
commercial_strategy_signals.detail: Hiring across AI and software engineering roles. Fast-growing. In-office catered lunch suggests SF/NY office-centric.

commercial_strategy_signals.signal: CodeRabbit topped Martian's independent code review benchmark (Mar 2026)
commercial_strategy_signals.detail: HN thread: 'CodeRabbit tops the first independent AI code review benchmark' (2026-03-06) and 'CodeRabbit tops the F1 score in Martian's code review benchmarks' (2026-03-04). Low HN engagement (1 pt) suggests community skepticism about benchmark methodology.

commercial_strategy_signals.signal: Qodo donated PR-Agent to open-source community, redirecting to Qodo 2.0
commercial_strategy_signals.detail: PR-Agent README explicitly states Qodo has donated the project to community. Qodo 2.0 is the new commercial product. Signals Qodo is moving up-market from open-source tool to platform.

commercial_strategy_signals.signal: CodeRabbit Slack agent launched with workspace scopes, knowledge base, automations
commercial_strategy_signals.detail: Reddit post (13 pts): 'CodeRabbit now works in Slack and can pull context from GitHub, Linear, docs, and more.' Signals expansion beyond PR review into full workflow context.
